title: Create Together 2
description:
Discover Create Together 2 !
This modpack aims to provide you with a pleasing gameplay with the create mod by adding various ways to decorate your ever growing factory !
body:
# Discover Create Together 2 !
> If you happen to know the first one, congratulations, you are one of the few to have witnessed it

This modpack aims to provide you with a pleasing experience with the create mod by adding various ways to decorate your ever expanding factory!

## Features
- A brand new terrain generation added by Terrestria
> Which allows you to wander around in the **new biomes** added by the mod while still being able to find **vanilla biomes**

- The create mod (And some of it's addons, such as)
    - Create Steam 'n' Rails
    - Create Deco
    - create Storage
    - Create Track Map
- EMI (alternative to JEI/REI)
- Chipped (to allow your wildest factory dreams to come true !)

### *You can also check the Mod list here*

<details>

  <summary>Mod List (61)</summary>

  # Main Mods (9)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
- [Create Track Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-track-map)
- [Create: Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-storage)
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)
- [Carry on](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on)
